name: GoPro, Inc.
description: GoPro, Inc. is an American technology company founded in 2002 by Nick Woodman. The company is renowned for designing, manufacturing, and selling pocket-sized, high-definition action cameras, mobile applications, and video-editing software. GoPro's versatile cameras are widely used by outdoor enthusiasts, athletes, and content creators to capture immersive, point-of-view footage of extreme sports and everyday adventures. In addition to hardware, GoPro offers subscription services that provide cloud storage, camera replacement benefits, and premium editing tools.
